programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hat in Hand
programme.desc: In debt to dangerous people, Tickle goes to Tim for help as Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom do battle with an angry nest of yellow jackets trying to lay claim to their still site. Josh comes to Cutie Pie's rescue when she gets hurt at the underground still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Last Shiner Standing
programme.desc: In the season finale, one moonshiner goes down as Tickle devises a bold but risky plan to sell Tim's shine. Josh and Bill's still site is compromised, while Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom brazenly run three stills. Finally, Deputy Sheriff Chuck makes his move.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Say Yes to the Mess
programme.desc: Tickle announces his engagement and Tim discovers why his best friend can't quit the outlaw side. Unable to sell any shine, Mike attempts a long-distance bootleg that puts him in the crosshairs of the law. Josh bets that Sin City needs one more vice.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Murphy's Law for Outlaws
programme.desc: Tickle and Tim put fire to their first backwoods run in a decade. With 250 gallons of mash on the brink of expiring, Mark and Digger torpedo their own operation. A minor oversight for Josh triggers a domino effect that threatens his entire site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Rolling Down the Mountain
programme.desc: With Extra Shine and bonus scenes: Mark and Digger give a young outlaw an apprenticeship opportunity while Mountain Man Mark tackles a week-long run and Josh attempts to fix his worm barrel.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hemp Shine
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws infuse anxiety-reducing CBD into their shine but the science is anything but stress-free. Josh digs into his secret stash to cure his subterranean blues. A mystery bootlegger dominates Mike's turf and it's about to get incendiary.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Snake Hotel
programme.desc: Winter's arrival drives mating pythons underground, forcing the team to target a network of dangerous tunnels and pull the pythons out by any means necessary.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller
programme.desc: A subculture of distillers across America carries on the backwoods tradition of moonshining. Now, judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, America's top legal and outlaw shiners go head to head to see who has what it takes to be called Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hemp Shine

programme.desc: Winter's arrival drives mating pythons underground, forcing the team to target a network of dangerous tunnels and pull the pythons out by any means necessary.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller
programme.desc: A subculture of distillers across America carries on the backwoods tradition of moonshining. Now, judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, America's top legal and outlaw shiners go head to head to see who has what it takes to be called Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Secret Backwoods Recipes
programme.desc: Only a handful of moonshine recipes are considered among the best, but the path to perfection is always paved with spills.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Loaded for Bear
programme.desc: Surrounded by aggressive and territorial black bears day and night, two survivalists must compete against the apex predators for resources in the Smoky Mountains of Tennessee.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Honduran Hell
programme.desc: In the mountainous rainforest of Honduras, a survivalist with an unusual past is paired with a hard-headed police detective, but predatorial jaguars, swarms of fire ants and a debilitating injury threaten their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Lost World
programme.desc: In this special episode, two lucky fans are selected to take on a special 14-day survival challenge. A single mom and an optimistic novice try to survive the wild coast of South Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Worlds Collide
programme.desc: Former military man, Chance is paired with an optimistic naturalist, Melissa, in the Amazon Jungle. Humidity, violent storms, caiman, and red-bellied piranha are just some of the threats they face. If they make it to day 21 they're in for a big twist.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stalked on All Sides
programme.desc: Pinned down by Africa's most dangerous threats, elephants, hippos and lions, Kel and Eric work together to avoid becoming prey, but a debilitating injury puts them both at risk. Then, survivalists struggle against threats both natural and supernatural.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Twinning
programme.desc: In an unprecedented Naked and Afraid challenge, identical twin sisters Amber and Serena, as well as brothers Warren and Thomas, are dropped in the African savannah. They take on rhinos, hyenas and a territorial leopard stalking their camp.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: She Wants It, She Takes It
programme.desc: Rhonda's home is filled with dumpster items and she has been forced to live in a camper in her backyard. Now, with neighbors threatening lawsuits and worse, Rhonda must clean up or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Hell Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: It's a family affair as the sister of star NBA player Stephen Curry hunts for her dream wedding dress. Cami Lee is back with her over the top mom who will stop at nothing to make sure Cami doesn't get a black dress, including hunting Randy down for help.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Walk Down the Aisle
programme.desc: Emily needs a form-fitting dress to walk down the aisle with her fiancé, who will be taking some of his first steps after being paralyzed in a football accident. Tanya is an artist whose vision of a dress eludes Randy and Albany.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Drinking Buddy
programme.desc: Whitney worries for her parents' safety after her dad falls down the stairs. Buddy discovers he must make amends to Whitney for his recovery. Ryan and Chase throw Whitney a party, but Chase is jealous when Whitney leaves to take a call from Buddy.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Super Heavyweight Ladies
programme.desc: Whitney trains for the State Championships with a new weightlifting coach. Then, she has some special words to share with Chase.

programme.desc: Jazz announces her college decision, setting her anxiety in motion. She struggles to plan a drag show fundraiser for Noelle's gender confirmation surgery. And during Jojo's breast consultation an explosive confrontation threatens to tear the family apart.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Two Houses, Two Mortgages

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Gorilla
programme.desc: Beast Boy turns into a loud, obnoxious gorilla and refuses to change back, driving Robin crazy. Gorilla Beast Boy takes over the leadership of the Titans, which leads to chaos.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Love Monsters
programme.desc: Raven warns the other Titans not to go near a box containing the Twin Destroyers of Azarath. Starfire can't help it and opens the box, giving hugs and snuggles to the two tiny, adorable Destroyers ... but love only makes the Destroyers stronger.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Gnome More Mister Nice Guy
programme.desc: When the daycare gets taken over by evil gnomes, Duncan finds himself on the wrong team.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Duck Duck Juice
programme.desc: The group taste test Chef's Pegasus Rainbow Latte, leading to Izzy and Jude getting hyper on caffeine.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Look Who's Clocking
programme.desc: When Harold’s warnings not to mess with the clock go ignored, the kids are forced to save themselves when Duncan tears a hole in the fabric of time.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Cluckwork Orange
programme.desc: Jude brings a chicken with a bad attitude back to the school, but its bad behavior starts getting on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Cruel Giggling Ghoul
programme.desc: The Titans go to an amusement park to see LeBron James but instead help solve a mystery.

programme.desc: The Titans become shipwrecked on a desert island.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Possession

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Formosan Clouded Leopard
programme.desc: Declared extinct only recently, Forrest is tracking clues and eyewitness accounts that suggest that the Formosan Clouded Leopard could still be alive. He treks deep into the jungles of Taiwan where a run-in with a predator might just solve a mystery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dodo of the North
programme.desc: Forrest travels to the Faroe Islands to look for any trace of the Great Auk. The search takes him through some of the most scenic and rugged terrain he's ever attempted in his passionate search for a large flightless seabird that has been long forgotten.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Madagascar Giant
programme.desc: Madagascar's Pachylemurs were red, furry giants, nearly the size of great apes. Recently discovered remains disprove that they went extinct 1000 years ago and Forrest scales the canopy of the jungle on a mission to prove the giant species still lives.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Fearless: Swarmed by Killer Bees
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson's dangerous past encounter with honey bees has lead him to join forces with bee conservationist, Chris Brinton. A stunt involving Peterson and 10,000 bees dispels misconceptions and reveals their passive nature.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Fearless: Dinner With a Devil
programme.desc: Coyote heads to Australia's Devil Ark conservatory and reveals the history behind the critically endangered Tasmanian devil. As he is exposed to their habitat and routine, he discovers the manpower needed to conserve this species.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Sharks in the Shadows
programme.desc: Coyote and his team travel to Australia to find the wobbegong shark. As night falls, they search the treacherous tidepools for this sly nocturnal predator and ponder whether these fearsome fish are a threat to humans.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Deadly Tide Pools
programme.desc: Coyote explores the coastline of Australia in hopes of discovering the most toxic aquatic creatures. As he battles the jagged rocks and crashing waves, he encounters a stonefish lurking beneath the mysterious tide pool water.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Most Amazing Discoveries: The Tortoise and the Croc
programme.desc: Forest heads deep into the jungles of Colombia, on a mission to prove the Rio Apaporis Caiman still exists. In the Galapagos, he is in search of the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal not seen in 100 years.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Most Amazing Discoveries: The Tortoise and the Croc
programme.desc: Forrest continues his search for the Fernandina Tortoise in the Galapagos, where there is an abundance of incredibly unique species. In Colombia, he is still trying to prove the Rio Apaporis Caiman exists.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Javan Tiger
programme.desc: Forrest delves into the vibrant island of Java in Indonesia in an attempt to find the Javan Tiger. This exotic predator was declared extinct in 2003, but recently, park rangers and locals have had sightings and are collecting evidence of its existence.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Most Amazing Discoveries: The Tortoise and the Croc
programme.desc: Forest heads deep into the jungles of Colombia, on a mission to prove the Rio Apaporis Caiman still exists. In the Galapagos, he is in search of the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal not seen in 100 years.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Javan Tiger
programme.desc: Forrest delves into the vibrant island of Java in Indonesia in an attempt to find the Javan Tiger. This exotic predator was declared extinct in 2003, but recently, park rangers and locals have had sightings and are collecting evidence of its existence.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Sharks in the Shadows
programme.desc: Coyote and his team travel to Australia to find the wobbegong shark. As night falls, they search the treacherous tidepools for this sly nocturnal predator and ponder whether these fearsome fish are a threat to humans.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Deadly Tide Pools
programme.desc: Coyote explores the coastline of Australia in hopes of discovering the most toxic aquatic creatures. As he battles the jagged rocks and crashing waves, he encounters a stonefish lurking beneath the mysterious tide pool water.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Colombian Dinosaur
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Colombia, Forrest is on a mission to prove the Rio Apaporis Caiman still exists. Locals believe this crocodilian resides within a lawless land inhabited by guerilla rebels, kidnappers, and deadly predators.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Swimming With Alligators
programme.desc: Steve and Terri and baby Bindi set out for the home of the alligator: America. They travel the bayous of Louisiana and Florida encountering alligators and snapping turtles, and capture and relocate a large male at the Eglin Air Force base in Florida.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Pocket Pets
programme.desc: See the world of puppies and kittens like never before.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Pee Battle
programme.desc: A mother daughter duo’s lovable cats are having a territorial pissing match that's destroying not only their furniture but also their relationship. The cat daddy connects with cat from heaven, Ziggy, who has CPR skills.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff returns from a free vet care clinic with a dog who was hit by a car. The owner of a kitten with suspected ringworm gets more than she bargained for. Dr. Jeff treats a family dog with a mysterious lump. And, Dr. Baier falls for a rescued puppy.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Hurricane Harvey Special
programme.desc: Dr. Blue opens up the clinic after Hurricane Harvey pours 30 plus inches of rain on the city of Houston, Texas. The doctors help animals affected by the storm, while dealing with the personal issues that Hurricane Harvey has brought to the city.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi's Lemur Island
programme.desc: The Australia Zoo's Alligator Snapping Turtles need a health check, and it's Robert's job to protect from their fierce bites. Terri and Bindi welcome seven new Lemurs from the US. The Zoo's Rescue Unit is called to save possums caught in a chimney.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Chester Zoo Goes Underwater

programme.title: Counting Cars: McQueen for a Day

programme.title: Counting Cars: Buggin' Out
programme.desc: Scott bugs out when he learns Danny's invested in a vintage dune buggy.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Floodpocalypse Now
programme.desc: Danny tries to score an ex-police motorcycle without getting busted, while a water main break threatens to put the shop permanently under water.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Old School
programme.desc: Shane's fiancée Tanya wants to return a favour by returning Shane's prized 1970 Mustang to its former glory. Later, Danny and Kevin find a rare Plymouth Roadrunner and help a portrait artist honour our fallen heroes.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Van Haulin
programme.desc: Danny helps Shannon restore an old VW van and later finds a Ford Bronco for a single mom who wants to revisit her youth.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Car Hoarder
programme.desc: Danny can't stop buying cars and ends up in an extremely heated roadside bidding war.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sharon Rides Again
programme.desc: A motorcycle-loving couple wants to hit the road again like they used to. Sharon hasn't been able to ride comfortably since she lost a leg, so it's up to Danny and the crew to build a bike that is comfortable, safe and as cool as the couple that's riding.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Horseplay
programme.desc: A high wire performer wants Danny to build a bike to commemorate his career and the records he has broken, and an Extreme Cowboy Racer wants the world's coolest trailer tricked out for her racing partner, Honey the Horse.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Heavy Metal
programme.desc: Danny impulsively buys a '69 Caddy and falls madly in love with her. Will he sell it for a big profit, or add her to his collection? Later, legendary rockers Judas Priest stop by to pick up a gift they had made for the band's newest member.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Firebird Fever
programme.desc: 'Engine Whisperer' Doc has a cool '67 Firebird he's been working on. While he's a mechanical maestro under the hood, his paint skills are lacking so he enlists Ryan to make it look as mean as it will run. Danny checks out a one-of-a-kind car collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Down by the Riviera
programme.desc: Legendary rocker George Lynch from the metal band Dokken stops by with his very cool 1965 Buick Riviera. He gives Danny free rein to put the Count's Kustoms rock 'n' roll touch on it. Also, Roli and Horny Mike custom wrap Roli's detailing van.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Never Forget Your First Z28, Part One
programme.desc: A client asks Danny to find and build a 1979 Camaro Z28 to commemorate the first car he ever owned. After finding one online, the project turns into a nightmare when the car is in worse condition than they thought.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Never Forget Your First Z28, Part Two
programme.desc: Danny's battle with nightmare Z28 continues as he puts it through endless fabrication to bring it back to life. When the client comes to pick it up, Danny will finally learn if it was worth all the trouble.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Fast and Furry-ous
programme.desc: Danny scores a pimp-tastic 1967 Impala, but when it's time to hand over the keys to an important client, Danny doesn't think he can let her go. Meanwhile, Roli does the unthinkable and puts the shop's top project in jeopardy.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bucks and Broncos Part One
programme.desc: Danny is inspired to take back on an old project that he's already sunk a lot of time and money into. For the shop to make any profit on the 1967 Ford Bronco, they will have to turn it around quickly.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bucks and Broncos Part Two
programme.desc: Danny has a customer all lined up to buy his 1967 Ford Bronco he's restoring, but Ryan's mistake has set the project way back. Meanwhile, Mike and Roli settle a score at a gun range with Shannon keeping the peace.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Back in Time
programme.desc: Two brothers want to surprise their dad with the ultimate car guy gift: a fully restored 1957 Special Edition T-Bird that's been sitting in the family's pasture for many years. Mike and Ryan find an unusual car collector with some very unusual rides.

programme.title: Counting Cars: CHiPs Bike

programme.desc: An underground labyrinth containing thousands of human skeletons is a dark mystery beneath the streets of Rome, and now, experts are using cutting-edge tech to reveal what killed them and why they were buried in this eerie place.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries of the Mummies
programme.desc: Cutting-edge archaeology is revealing the secrets of the world's most mysterious mummies. As experts make new discoveries that turn up fresh leads to millennia-old cold cases, they might finally understand who these people were and why they suddenly died.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Life of Jesus

programme.desc: New discoveries reveal dark secrets of the event that destroyed Pompeii.

programme.title: American Justice: Cops on Trial
programme.desc: Police officers and the general public are held to different standards of justice.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 100%, Every Time
programme.desc: Randy and Justin chase down a suspected car thief, while both EMT teams respond to emergency calls involving children in distress.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Saints and Sinners
programme.desc: Like any dad, Titus wants the best for his son. As an EMT, he sees just how dire life can get. Meanwhile, police officers continue to work desperately to get guns off the street and make the city a safer place to live.

programme.title: Monstresses: Katie Belflower & Brandita Taliano
programme.desc: 2003, Livermore, California: 17-year old Katie Bellflower seduces a high school classmate's husband, 20-year old Mike Simons. The young Monstress is willing to kill not just once--but twice--to keep Simons to herself.

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Monstresses: Elizabeth Reynolds & Linda Henning
programme.desc: In 2003 Kingsville, Texas, Elizabeth Reynolds claims she's divorced when she gets involved with 39-year-old Al Benitez. But when he finds out she's still married, he tries to break it off. She goes berserk and hires a man to get her revenge on Al.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: On the Run
programme.desc: When Susan Hamlin walks into a police station to confess that she is part of a satanic cult and plans to murder her husband, no one could guess that the truth is even more bizarre and sinister, or that it is all part of her own desperate escape plan.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Until We Meet Again
programme.desc: When James Henslee realized that he was the police's prime suspect, he couldn't believe it.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our House of Horrors
programme.desc: Alice Swanson was always envious of the perfect life her childhood neighbor, William Jennings Choyce, and his family seemed to have. But after she married him, she slowly realized that nothing under the surface was as perfect as it seemed.

programme.title: Diabolical: When All Else Fails
programme.desc: After her home is invaded and her husband murdered, Shaunna Dodd recounts her harrowing ordeal at gunpoint. But when investigators dig deeper, they uncover a tale of lies, infidelity, and shady characters who have wandered into the Washoe Valley.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: On Her Own
programme.desc: Native Swede, Marioara Shand, is setting out on her own in Taos, New Mexico, after a recent breakup. One day in July of 2002, police discover her body in a brutal, bloody scene inside her new home.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seen at Susan's
programme.desc: On April 12th 2008, Susan Casey vanishes after a night out. The only clues left behind are suspicious drag marks outside her home. CCTV footage reveals three different suspects on the scene. The police must find out who is lying.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: On Her Own

programme.title: Dateline: The Informant
programme.desc: A young woman’s chilling story about a girl’s abduction and murder helps re-open a case that has haunted a New York town for decades.

programme.title: Dateline: A Family's Story
programme.desc: Reporting on the recent developments in the Susan Powell case, including the murder-suicide committed by her husband.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Lost Boys
programme.desc: A protective grandfather is found beaten to death on the side of the road. The crime scene offers few clues, but news of a recent incident involving a beloved birthday gift leads Detective Demery to the most unexpected of killers.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Red Flags
programme.desc: A popular teen is shot down at school, but the shooter was no student, with motives far more sinister than in a typical schoolyard spat. Then, Demery must rely on instinct when investigating a supposed break-in that culminated in a bloody showdown.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Fair Game
programme.desc: A handicapped fair worker is shot in the face for no apparent reason. To solve this tragic mystery, Detective Rod Demery must retrace the victim's final steps and string together a series of seemingly unrelated clues.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Death of a Dream
programme.desc: An aspiring Broadway dancer is murdered; did her secrets contribute to her death? Correspondent Erin Moriarty reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Wounded by Love
programme.desc: A lover is shot dead and a police recorded cell phone video may not be enough to clear or convict the man's girlfriend.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The DNA of a Killer
programme.desc: Police have DNA evidence from a brutal murder but can't match a killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it's up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lady in Red
programme.desc: A woman in red drops a dying man off at a firehouse and then vanishes. Police soon learn the victim is a contractor with a troubled personal life, but identifying the mystery woman is the hurdle they must overcome in order to bring him justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cynthia
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. When all leads dry up, the case runs cold. But years later, Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. Six months later however, Kenda receives an unprompted confession that propels the case in a whole new direction.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Israel
programme.desc: Travel to the Middle East to uncover the very latest weapons being designed for the Israel Defence Forces.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite of Mirrors
programme.desc: Nicole focuses her attention on the neglected master bedroom and must rethink the structure of the room to come up with a charming space the house deserves. She decides to add extra sleeping room by turning the laundry room into a second bedroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Facing the Front Porch
programme.desc: The front of her Lake Orion, MI, house is barely accessible, and the driveway is solid dirt. Nicole sets out to reverse that by renovating the front porch and adding a Model-T style driveway. She also adds a white picket fence and heavy landscaping.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Kitchen Nightmare
programme.desc: Nicole knows that the kitchen and dining room are the heart of this home and want to make them the house's functional centerpiece. She rips out what was left behind and starts over with a new layout, cabinets and appliances.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: New Project, New Headache
programme.desc: When a hundred-year-old Victorian home that Nicole wants to renovate sells to other buyers, she convinces them to let her be involved as they work to get it back on the market.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Redux
programme.desc: With the exterior of the Harriet Project completely restored, Nicole and the guys move inside and begin demolition to prepare for pluming and electrical work.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Conundrums
programme.desc: Nicole searches for a set of salvaged cabinets to use in the Harriet Project's upper unit kitchen. With her own house still up for sale, Nicole visits the historical society to see if she can discover any new information about the property.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Revamp
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the hardwood floors in both living rooms of the Harriet Project and searches for replica tile to begin restoring a fireplace in the downstairs unit.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Finished Project
programme.desc: With only a few weeks left to finish the Harriet Project, Nicole and the homeowners divide and conquer to complete the lower unit's living room and kitchen. Nicole visits a local high school shop class to work on a radiator cover for the living room.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Contemporary Elegance
programme.desc: Juan and Katy's huge backyard is empty and boring. They long for more living space. Matt adds a huge gravel patio as well as a huge, modern pergola with room for a dining and lounging area. Plants, shrubs and a bocce ball court jazz up the space.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1802 Farmhouse Exterior
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin is called on to restore the exterior of an 1802 farmhouse. Jeff and his team uncover a historic stone path, re-create the original shutters and build a post and beam style front porch. They also add a rustic entertainment area.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1839 Lofty Master Suite
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin and his team are recruited to bring back some much-needed character to the master suite of an 1839 farmhouse.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1713 Dueling Fireplaces
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin is called on to restore a dated foyer and a huge living room with two fireplaces in a 1713 stone house. He and his team must make the dueling fireplaces work together while also bringing warmth and historic charm to the spaces.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1785 Master Suite Rework
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited to open up a cramped master suite and rework the layout to make room for a huge walk-in shower. He and his team hope to expose a hidden original fireplace and find some additional stone in the bathroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s Entryway Transformation
programme.desc: A couple calls on Jeff Devlin and his team to restore their historic dining room and exterior facade. Jeff adds tons of historic charm to the exterior and completely transforms the dining room with a custom-built mud room nook.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1782 Farmhouse Redo
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin and his crew are called in to transform a dated kitchen and unfunctional dining room in a 1700s farmhouse.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1825 Family Room Fix
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked to restore a crumbling family room and adjacent sun room in an 1825 stone home. He and his team bring in a stunning bluestone floor and create tons of built-in storage. They transform the sun room into an airy home office.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Dining Room Discoveries
programme.desc: A couple calls on Jeff to restore every ounce of character he can find in their historic home. They also want him to bring a little history into their 1970s living room addition. Jeff finds not one, but two big surprises hidden in the dining room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1798 Living Room Switch
programme.desc: A couple with a home built in 1798 enlists Jeff to transform their original living room into a dining room to fit their growing family. Then, Jeff and the crew uncover an amazing surprise while stripping down an original wood mantel.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Mudroom From Scratch
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked with turning a couple's wide-open front porch into an enclosed mudroom that blends the 1740s stone portion of their home with the 1800s wood siding portion. He also uncovers a gorgeous stone fireplace while restoring the living room.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Castle in Cave Spring, GA
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders turn one of the biggest barns they've ever saved into an even bigger home. They work through sweltering heat to transform this Ohio double-pen barn. Mark visits a small log cabin with a lot of charm and gets a look at the dog trot.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Part of the Family
programme.desc: The guys head to Bronston, Kentucky, to check out a 150-year-old, double-pen farmhouse built by their client's great-grandfather. She hopes to preserve her pioneer heritage, so the crew takes care to save every log possible.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Memory Lane
programme.desc: As the guys take down another barn they share memories from their earlier days, and they meet the family who will use the logs to build an addition on their Florida home.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meaty Marvels
programme.desc: In Palatine, IL, Greg and Kristina create Brazilian-style barbecue at Rockin Rodizio.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat in Music City
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the country music capital Nashville, where chefs are playing meaty tunes. At Urban Grub, Chef Edgar Pendley fans the flames in a massive 18-foot-tall hearth and hangs a wall of house-made andouille sausages and pork ribs.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Revolutionary Roasts
programme.desc: Mass. Roger puts the pedal to the metal on Chef Jeremy Stanton's 'Rotisserie Bike.'

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heavy Metal Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets blown away by not one but two of the biggest metal-clad rigs he's ever seen. In Algoma, WI, he meets brothers Brad and Aric Schmiling who use a giant cinder block pit and massive metal grates to roast a whole steer.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Beef
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the tastiest beef dishes in restaurants across America from traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Appetizers
programme.desc: Roger Mooking starts the meal off right with 15 of the best appetizers in the United States. From nachos and chicken wings to oysters, fries and more, Roger's going coast-to-coast to find the best!

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City Of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meatloaded Makeovers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon starts with Vietnamese fusion dishes like juicy, tender shaking beef and mini shrimp-stuffed pancakes. In Colorado Springs, an Asian-inspired duck burger gets a wonton topper, and a meaty take on a classic PB and J.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, CT
programme.desc: Casey's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Connecticut to conquer land with a totally bonkers burger, sea with a crazy coastal feast and food with a ridiculously massive sundae in Mel's Downtown Creamery's Big Kahuna Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Whoa-Oh, I'm On A Roll
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: World's Best Mom
programme.desc: Jack tries his hand at parenting in Mother Simulator, Crank gets hired in Job Simulator, and Markiplier takes a road trip in Clustertruck.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!
programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Song Remains Asleep/ Baby Got Hunchback
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia wants to replace the hotel's elevator music. Mavis and the gang uncover Quasimodo's secret recipe for dirt flambé.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Exit Sandman/ Roadkill Trip
programme.desc: Mavis and the group rebuild Diane's chicken coop, but their efforts are interrupting the Sandman's sleeping patterns. His solution is to cast a spell on them. When Mavis and Uncle Gene learn that the Roadkill Grill is closing, they plan a road trip.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Takeover
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Parker's Gotta Go
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Harry Osborn seek the Goblin King to determine who is behind the Goblin Mask.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Dread Tower! The Dark Citadel!
programme.desc: Aiger and Ranjiro arrive at the Dread Tower, but with Hyde calling the shots, nothing is as it seems. And with the grand entrance of notorious Bey-burglar, Count Nightfell, things are about to get even more unpredictable.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Aiming for the Top Floor!
programme.desc: A second day in Malie City provides our heroes with a hard-earned change for some unexpected excitement.

programme.title: Dateline: The Quiet One

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Viva Las Vegas

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Crimeleon

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Savior

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Witness

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Disabled

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Bedtime

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Ace

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates why Northwest Flight 2501 vanished, taking the lives of all 58 people on board.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Search for the Sultan's Heart
programme.desc: Four years after Josh Gates went on a journey to find the lost heart of Sultan Suleiman the Magnificent, he travels to the newly rediscovered town of Turbek for some shocking new revelations about the case.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Unearthed: The Hunt for Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Unearthed with extra facts and bonus footage: Josh goes around the world learning how modern man has survived to the modern day and what our future may hold for humanity.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ancient Ancestors Revealed
programme.desc: Josh Gates continues his epic investigation as he ranges across Africa to study wild chimpanzees and scales sheer cliffs on his quest for the missing links of human evolution. In Mexico City, the Expedition X investigation puts the team's safety at risk.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ancient Ancestors Revealed
programme.desc: Josh Gates continues his epic investigation as he ranges across Africa to study wild chimpanzees and scales sheer cliffs on his quest for the missing links of human evolution. In Mexico City, the Expedition X investigation puts the team's safety at risk.

programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Vocation, Vocation, Vocation
programme.desc: From the ultimate samurai smack down in 17th-century Japan to a young author who found inspiration for his most terrifying tale in Boston, Josh Gates highlights five locations where people's passions were transformed into lasting legacies.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: From a tense standoff near the Berlin Wall at the height of the Cold War to an Arizona prison where an unlikely outlaw finagled her freedom, Josh Gates explores five legendary locations where fight or flight were the only options.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Run for the Hills
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt to rescue a former apprentice from a moonshine calamity. An unknown competitor invades Mike's turf, forcing him to change his shine strategy. Mark and Huck bank on backwoods survival skills to fuel their high-proof run.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Say Yes to the Mess
programme.desc: Tickle announces his engagement and Tim discovers why his best friend can't quit the outlaw side. Unable to sell any shine, Mike attempts a long-distance bootleg that puts him in the crosshairs of the law. Josh bets that Sin City needs one more vice.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Murphy's Law for Outlaws
programme.desc: Tickle and Tim put fire to their first backwoods run in a decade. With 250 gallons of mash on the brink of expiring, Mark and Digger torpedo their own operation. A minor oversight for Josh triggers a domino effect that threatens his entire site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rolling Down the Mountain
programme.desc: A young outlaw with an old pot still earns an apprenticeship with Mark and Digger. Mountain man Mark tackles a week-long run to hit an $18K order that includes special delivery. In a desperate attempt to fix his worm barrel, Josh dives in headfirst.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jennifer and Marissa and Liz
programme.desc: Liz has gone from being bedbound with lymphedemas on both legs, to standing and walking, but old fears are about to threaten her progress. If Jenn and Marissa can't get along as mother and daughter to lose weight, they'll have to proceed apart.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Carlton and Shantel's Story
programme.desc: Shantel's brother Carlton lives downstairs but she hardly ever sees him because at 600+ lbs each, neither of them can do the stairs safely. Now to break free from codependent eating, they need Dr. Now's help to reforge their sibling relationship.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Seana's Story
programme.desc: Seana is 23 and nearly 700 lbs, living at her mom's house. She is depressed and anxious and her weight-gain threatens to take her last breath. Dr. Now can give her the tools she needs to live, but until she chooses life, no one can save Seana but Seana.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Fixing Frankenstein
programme.desc: Dr. Schaeffer has to straighten a woman's serpentine foot to reset her life, as Dr. Vincent gets a drummer's foot back on the beat.

programme.title: Save My Skin: Eczema-stential Crisis
programme.desc: Louise's painful skin condition has taken over her life. Andrew dreams of finding love but the bumps on his scalp are turning off the ladies. Scott's odorous cysts are ruining his life and Tracey finally seeks treatment for the lump on her leg.

programme.title: Counting On: The Vuolos Buy a House

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Work on the Jerk
programme.desc: After Ryan and Heather's illicit kiss, Whitney warns them not to date. Then, Whitney quits BGDC to focus on her new business.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: In Sickness and in Wealth
programme.desc: Extreme Cheapskates Karen and Barry cannot stand the idea of spending money. Whether it's frying breakfast on the car engine or pulling out their own tooth at home, no task is too big and no savings too small.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Vacations
programme.desc: Follow a group of penny-pinching Americans who want to hit the open road without breaking open their wallets. Meet a family of four who share one bunk bed at a Dude Ranch and a mom and daughter who wear their clothes and pack food in their carry on.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Jen/ Chanda
programme.desc: After a traumatic stillbirth, Jen is pregnant again and is terrified to tell anybody for fear that history will repeat itself. Chanda is afraid to tell her parents she's pregnant out of wedlock again.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Krystal/ Danie
programme.desc: Krystal is keeping the baby a secret from her mother-in-law due to their dire financial situation. Dannie fears that if she tells her dad she's pregnant he will reject her child the way he rejected Danie as a kid.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I Can't Breathe

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim and Matt
programme.desc: Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over a decade, but he's refused to meet her.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized: Pandamonium

programme.title: The Aquarium: Seal the Deal
programme.desc: Two African penguins, Freya and Neo, welcome a young chick, but there's cause for concern when health problems arise. Staff work to train a trio of harbor seals to ride the elevator, with the only hiccup being a nervous seal named Floyd.

programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.desc: Giant Martians arrive on Earth and claim that they are good-natured and want to serve man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Rites of Jeff Myrtlebank
programme.desc: At his funeral, Jeff sits upright in his coffin and the townsfolk believe he's possessed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Man Up
programme.desc: The CSIs question the validity of an online picture depicting a murdered call girl, until they find the same woman strangled to death in the dumpster that appeared in the photo.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Kiss Before Frying
programme.desc: The CSIs link a body with severe burn marks to a possible execution by electric chair and a legendary Vegas murder. Meanwhile, Greg asks out Ellen, a pretty schoolteacher and forensics enthusiast who has been touring the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Two Mrs. Grissoms
programme.desc: A night of celebration ends with a bang when the director of a scholarship foundation for the deaf is killed by a car bomb, prompting Sara to interrogate the students and faculty of the college where her mother-in-law works.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: All That Cremains
programme.desc: A thrift store donation turns gruesome when a dead body is found in a box. Meanwhile, Langston's wife pays him a surprise visit in the crime lab.

programme.title: Movie: Blade II
programme.desc: A vampire-human hybrid struggles to save the human race from those who want to destroy it.

programme.title: Movie: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: The demigod Hercules grows into a man with incredible strength and falls in love with a princess who is betrothed to his brother. Betrayed by the king and sold into slavery, Hercules must fight his way back to the kingdom he is destined to save.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Reno Interrupted
programme.desc: After a family crisis moved them back in with mom and dad, a couple is ready and eager to move on in a new home of their own. But a tricky house hunt leads back to square one as the Property Brothers try to convince them to see dream-home potential.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Home With a View
programme.desc: A couple looks for a forever home to share in a popular lakefront community outside of Nashville, and the choice comes down to two very different contenders.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Cheer-tastic Design
programme.desc: A single mom and her three cheerleading kids search for a new home where they can make a fresh start. Drew leads the search for a spacious gymnastics-friendly home with grandma's support.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Fan Faves: Bocas del Toro Blogosphere
programme.desc: After falling in love in Bocas del Toro, Panama, an American couple started an around-the-world journey and created a blog to capture their adventures. Now, they want to purchase a home in the place where they met so they can rest between trips.

programme.title: House Hunters: Going Ashore in Gallatin, Tennessee
programme.desc: A suburban Nashville couple is ready to end houseboat living and start a family on dry land. He wants another fixer with a lot of acreage in the country but she'd prefer a home in town that doesn't come with a lot of projects.

programme.title: Extreme Makeover: Home Edition - Behind the Bus: This Land Is Your Land
programme.desc: A young man and his siblings relocated to Ogden, Utah, as refugees after experiencing a devastating loss in the Congo. Now, Jesse Tyler Ferguson gives the family life-changing news before Tamara Day and volunteers build them a modern-tropical home.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Trade Secrets: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A young family of five looks to put down roots in Florida by building their forever home on a 2-acre lot. Brian and Mika mix modern touches with rustic, farmhouse charm to create a dream home the family can enjoy for years to come.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home - Unpacked: Raise the Kids, Ignore the House
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan step in and overhaul a couple's tired living room, kitchen and dining room to give their aging home the love it needs.

programme.title: House Hunters International: The Dueling Cabos
programme.desc: A couple that's grown weary of Wisconsin winters looks for a second home in Los Cabos, Mexico. He wants to be in the action of Cabo San Lucas while she's convinced sleepy San Jose del Cabo is a better fit, and one of them must compromise.

programme.title: House Hunters: A House With Dance Space
programme.desc: A first-time buyer and part-time fire dancer is looking for a home in Washington, DC, with extra rooms to rent out. She thinks a fixer is her best bet, but her friend, and possible tenant, needs a place to live right now.

programme.title: Mountain Life: Mountain Hideaway Hunt in Midway, Utah

programme.title: Mountain Life: South Appalachian Getaway
programme.desc: A young couple looks for the perfect starter home in Canton, NC, an undiscovered gem nestled in the southern Appalachians.

programme.title: Island Life: New Beginnings on Orange Beach
programme.desc: A young, single woman is tired of her quiet life in Troy, Alabama, and decides to look for a new career, home and excitement in her favorite childhood vacation spot of Orange Beach, Alabama.

programme.title: Island Life: Planting Roots on North Carolina's Outer Banks
programme.desc: A family of five is excited to leave Virginia Beach and plant roots on North Carolina's Outer Banks. After being the family's go-to vacation spot for years, they hope to find a large home with coastal charm and water views.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Raising Kids in San Carlos
programme.desc: Single father Art feels he's missing out on time with his two kids because of his busy job. He has decided to sell his business in Arizona and relocate to San Carlos, Mexico, so the family can experience a new culture and a healthy lifestyle.

programme.title: Mexico Life: A Life Without Snow in Mexico
programme.desc: Tired of the long winters, a Canadian couple looks to escape to Isla Mujeres, Mexico. While they agree on the location, they're not sure what kind of condo will benefit them most.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Glorified Shed Gets Modern Cottage Makeover
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol Marunde get a deal on a structure that looks like a glorified shed on zoned horse property not far from the Strip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Vegas Beach House
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol take a three-bedroom house in as-is condition from a woman who needs to sell quickly. They set out to create an open dining and living space, use hardwood flooring on the ceiling, freshen up the pool and give it a beach theme.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Lucky in Vegas
programme.desc: Bristol and Aubrey give a condo a Vegas bachelor theme to appeal to the singles in the area. They create a custom-built entertainment center as a focal point. Aubrey must think quickly when a vanity arrives in the wrong colour.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Bristol's Rustic Retreat
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol swap jobs as they renovate a Vegas townhouse, with Aubrey handling the home's construction and Bristol creating a design plan that will give the rooms a rustic feel. Later they make time to attend a charity event at Caesar's Palace.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Townhouse Redux
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol purchase a two-story townhouse with familiar floor plan and super high ceilings. The duo gives the entire space a modern glam makeover that features a fireplace upgraded with floor-to-ceiling tile.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Duplex Dilemma
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol purchase a small duplex and decide to convert it into a single-family home with a fun design theme inspired by Aubrey's college days. The project is finalized with a total redo of the home's facade to include an A-frame entrance.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Vintage Vegas
programme.desc: A home with an in-law suite leads Aubrey to come up with a design to convert it back to a single-family unit. Then, she takes advantage of a second kitchen to create a Vegas-inspired game room.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas: Bold Blue Condo
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol jump at the opportunity to flip a condo just off the Vegas Strip. A unit that is in desperate need for an update, Aubrey chooses a bold design featuring navy blue walls and white wainscoting in the living room.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Wabannsia Made Wonderful
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan take a huge risk when they buy an oddball, boxlike house from the 90s. A flooded basement is just the beginning of the problems they encounter, so Alison must find a way to bring big design to a house that's hurtling over budget.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: To Sell or Not to Sell

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Roof-raising Race for Space

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Historical Headache

programme.desc: Not even snow and ice can stop the staff at Pol Veterinary Services from doing their jobs.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Goliath of the Outback
programme.desc: The Mack Superliner is a record-breaking monster truck that can haul huge loads across the dangerous dirt roads of the Australian Outback.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Monster Train
programme.desc: One of the largest trains in the world, the SD70 locomotive leads a 1.6-mile-long monster hauling 24,000 tons of iron ore through the wilderness.

programme.title: Mega Machines: World's Strongest Plane
programme.desc: The world's largest production cargo plane must carry a record-breaking load in a race against the clock. The Antonov 124 is an air monster that can swallow three Apache helicopters whole and features engines with more thrust than eight F16 fighter jets.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Toughest Planes
programme.desc: The world's most advanced military planes were built with cutting-edge aerospace engineering and innovative defense technology, and special access reveals how these guardians of the sky work.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Goliath of the Sky
programme.desc: The Airbus Beluga is an extraordinary mega-freight plane that can carry 47 tons of cargo on a single trip. Behind-the-scenes access into this hi-tech behemoth reveals how its crew races against the clock to transport massive loads across the planet.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big: Monster Ship Confidential
programme.desc: Richard Hammond joins the crew of one of the biggest ships on earth, a monster cargo vessel that uses cutting-edge engineering and the latest tech to deliver vital materials on a non-stop 28,000-mile voyage.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Swamp Monster
programme.desc: When an oil rig in Louisiana drills into something unexpected, a cataclysmic event is unleashed, causing a lake to suddenly disappear; experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how it can be fixed.
