programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Lethal Weapons
programme.desc: A look at how pictures from the Hubble telescope made the comet of the century look like an alien spacecraft. And exploring the question of whether earth has already been invaded by alien organisms.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Learn what could make a NASA astronaut report seeing a flying saucer in the skies above the US Air Force test range. Also, learn how the swirling gases of Saturn have formed a perfect hexagon that has hovered above the planet's pole for 30 years.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Life in Hell
programme.desc: A UFO crashes in Pennsylvania. Was it a secret Soviet satellite, or something far more dangerous? On Mercury, NASA finds the impossible: frozen water. A strange object causes a skyscraper-sized shadow on the surface of Mars' largest moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Astronaut Mystery Special
programme.desc: While in space, astronauts face strange, unexplainable, and almost deadly phenomena. In this special episode, we countdown astronauts most narrow escapes.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Attack of the Thunderballs
programme.desc: Astronauts are evacuated when a mystery object is discovered hurtling towards the ISS, a NASA secret agent goes undercover to recover missing moon rocks and scientists struggle to find answers when they find a huge void at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Asteroid Apocalypse: The New Threat
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: First Second of the Big Bang
programme.desc: The first second of the Universe, the creation of everything when space, time, matter and energy burst into existence. It is the most important second in history, which seals the Universe's fate and defines everything that comes after - including us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Uranus and Neptune: Rise of the Ice Giants
programme.desc: Uranus and Neptune are mysterious, icy worlds at the edge of our solar system, and new discoveries reveal that these strange planets might have helped start life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Last Stars
programme.desc: Our universe's stars are dying off faster than new ones are born, and using the latest technology, experts investigate the secrets of the last stars of the cosmos and what this stellar apocalypse means for life on earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: NASA's Journey to Mars
programme.desc: NASA is on a mission to send humans to Mars within just 15 years, but to reach this next frontier of space exploration, experts must discover brand-new technology and cutting-edge science that protects astronauts from the Red Planet's deadliest killers.

programme.title: See No Evil: Don't Get in the Truck
programme.desc: On February 18th 2014, Emily Lambert goes missing after spending the night at a hotel bar with her new boyfriend. Two days later, she's found murdered on remote farmland. Detectives scour CCTV footage from the hotel and bar searching for her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: On October 26th, 2009, widower Philip Gatusso is murdered in the quiet town of Fargo, North Dakota. As his in-laws drive across states to care for their now orphaned granddaughter, detectives to turn to a witness that never sleeps - surveillance video.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Megan

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Cold Blood

programme.desc: Salvador Vaca Garcia tearfully appears on local news when his girlfriend disappears. John Walsh scrutinizes Vaca Garcia's story. Later, Callahan Walsh looks at Brian Keith Freeman who allegedly slits his fiancé's throat when their engagement falls apart.

programme.title: Dead of Night: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: After finishing a midnight shift at a local factory, Fred Matting is brutally murdered in his own driveway. His once peaceful neighborhood morphs into a living hell as local residents and authorities fear a vicious killer lies in wait to strike again.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Panic Room
programme.desc: A young woman with a promising future vanishes from her apartment in the middle of the night. Family and friends search desperately for any sign of her, but the truth will only come to light after a grisly crime is committed just miles away.

programme.desc: Carol has been waiting 25 years to marry the love of her life, Jack Parkes. Six weeks away from their wedding in Kennedy Township, PA, she finds him shot in the head in their living room. The murder will destroy her life and uncover dark family secrets.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Scared Silent
programme.desc: When Marshall Dent goes missing on Christmas Eve, the Native American community of Shawnee, Oklahoma bands together. After weeks of searching, Marshall is found in a shallow grave on sacred ground, leaving authorities scrambling to find the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Twisted Justice
programme.desc: An unlikely pair of investigators is tasked with solving a heartbreaking murder that has tormented a family for years.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Dream Shattered
programme.desc: A young schoolteacher is savagely murdered in the doorway of her own home.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Officer Down
programme.desc: A beloved detective is killed during a shootout in at a downtown Atlanta hotel. His fellow officers, and his own son, work hard to bring the shooters to justice.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Bloodiest Bond
programme.desc: What starts as a childhood friendship between identical twin sisters and the older neighborhood boy they both like turns into a turbulent adult romance, and a cry for help that ends in murder.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Daddy's Girls
programme.desc: Tensions arise when a new addition to the Finkle family shakes up their peaceful dynamic, but no one could predict the fatal and gruesome results to come.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Blood in the Snow
programme.desc: When a philandering husband is reported missing, police quickly suspect foul play, and focus on not only his wife but on her best friend in the world, her sister.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Dead Ringers
programme.desc: The Beck twins spend their entire lives side by side in the same house, until the day one of them decides that she's had enough.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fire In the Sky
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths behind extraterrestrial spacecraft and we learn the truth of two pioneering flights.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: The Great Escape
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we uncover the real facts behind two legendary battles waged on American soil and we put the spotlight on great showmen to separate myth from truth.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Striking it Rich
programme.desc: Discover the real facts behind America's biggest economic boom and biggest bust, and learn the truth behind some of Las Vegas' greatest myths.

programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

Barnwood Builders: Good Neighbors
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a dangerous barn for their new neighbours and build a replica of Abraham Lincoln's boyhood cabin. Graham learns to make bentwood furniture, and the teams visit a stunning opera house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Boneyard Punch List
programme.desc: While Mark is on the road drumming up new business, the guys pick off a list of chores on the Boneyard, including stacking the Hamlin cabin. Meanwhile, Mark checks out the most incredible hand-hewn timber-frame barn he's ever seen.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mountaineer Volunteers
programme.desc: Mark donates a timber frame to his alma mater, West Virginia University, as the latest addition to their pioneer heritage center.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Cottage
programme.desc: The guys turn a brand new storage shed into an 1800s log cabin, then drive it to Round Top, Texas. Mark gets a lesson from a local silversmith, and the team visits historic structures built around the state by 19th-century pioneers.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael buy a bungalow in the country that sits on five acres with a barn and two-car garage. It also has major water issues, leeching bed woes and a flooring battle that won't be swept under the rug.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael rush to finish the Country House before winter hits, but their schedule and budget are tested when an open permit, left on the barn by previous owners, is discovered.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Beer Garden Backyard
programme.desc: A small and cluttered backyard, with dead plants and ugly concrete, turns into a beer garden fit for a home brewer! Sophisticated steel planters and concrete pavers surrounded by turf clean up what was once a mess. A barbecue and bar are the focal points.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Her Way or the Highway
programme.desc: Monica has worked on her own home and believes that she knows everything about construction. Whit thinks she might be making things more difficult than they need to be, but what Monica wants, Monica gets.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Father Flips Best
programme.desc: A young, aspiring house flipper, Becky, partners up with her father to flip a house in Dundalk, Maryland. Perry wants to teach Becky all the ins and outs of home renovation.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Dancing on the Drop Ceiling
programme.desc: When Daniel accidentally wins a dilapidated house in an auction, he and his pregnant wife Katie must rush to finish the house before their baby's due date. However with multiple delays and a lack of experience, the chances get slimmer as the days go by.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Hole Budget
programme.desc: Samm and her husband Chris have always loved doing DIY projects on their own home, so they decided to flip a house.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Going Against the Grain
programme.desc: Design-savvy Shayla enlists her mom, Michelle, to help her with some of the heavy lifting on her first flip. The deeper they get into the renovation, the more Shayla realizes that her vision may not become a reality.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: The House of Broken Beams
programme.desc: Young architects Michele and her boyfriend Kris have decided to start their own construction and design business by flipping houses in upstate New York. While they have experience, the stress of the flip puts a strain on their relationship.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Miami
programme.desc: We are headed to Miami for a little fun in the sun and some truly epic eats. We're trying it all, from stone crabs at Joe's, to the lamb shank at Sardinia. The piping hot oven at Fratelli La Bufala is turning out pillowy calzones.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mid-Atlantic
programme.desc: A Mid-Atlantic sampling of seafood, from crab cakes in Baltimore, to paella in Washington, DC.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Nola
programme.desc: New Orleans charms viewers with its distinct culinary style.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New York
programme.desc: We're in New York City for a tour of the town's best eats. From Velselka's borscht in the East Village to smoked herring on the Upper West Side.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways
programme.desc: Michael begins his meat-seeking journey in Lockhart, Texas, where one family remains at the forefront of America's greatest barbecue after four generations. Next, he swings over to a British-style joint in Brooklyn where they use lobster meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Festivals
programme.desc: Join the party as Roger Mooking visits three of the greatest fire-roasted ragers that cook mountains of meat and keep the barbecue faithful lining up for more. He attends a church picnic with nearly four tons of meat and a crowd of 4,000 carnivores.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Five Bbq Chicken Favorites
programme.desc: Roger Mooking has plucked his way through plenty of barbecue chicken, but only the very best birds make this list of his top five favourites.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Burgers, Pizza and Waffles

programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Los Angeles to visit a husband-and-wife-owned truck whose authentic, buttery French crepes are winning over Californians. Next, he's off to North Carolina for a taste of Indian street food.

programme.desc: Brad slurps a complex Vietnamese pho served by a husband-and-wife owned food truck with a cult following in Los Angeles. Next, he heads to Lakewood, California, to board a buzz-worthy food truck that's giving locals an authentic taste of paella.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pigging Out On Pork

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Bill's Broken Promise/ Born Tree
programme.desc: It’s Rocky’s birthday and Bill is tasked with inviting Giganto to the party. Tiny grows attached to a sapling tree and isn't ready to let go when the tree is ready to be planted.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Challenge / Giganto's Boss
programme.desc: The raptors challenge the Dinos to a game of basketball for the rights to the playground; Rocky convinces everyone he's the Giganto-Whisperer.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Guru Goofy/ Bed, Breakfast and Bungled!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pigs and Pugs/ Bob Loves Mona
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens, Plagues and Epidemics
programme.desc: Scientists are continually challenged by unidentified strains of bacteria with mysterious origins. Take a look at whether these strains could come from an extra terrestrial source.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Robots
programme.desc: In the 21st century, robots are being programmed to do everything from perform surgery on humans to explore other planets. Also, humanoid robots are rapidly reaching a level of sophistication that was thought to exist only in science fiction.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Evolution
programme.desc: Ancient Astronaut theorists have suggested that many of the divine beings depicted in cultures throughout the world are not really divine or mythological but instead reflect extraterrestrial visitations that our ancestors did not understand.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Wisdom Keepers
programme.desc: The Aborigines of Australia are the oldest, continuously surviving society on Earth. The stories preserved in their oral tradition are said to date back over 60,000 years. Their legends are now being scientifically verified by using geological records.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Hidden Empire
programme.desc: China is the cradle to one of mankind's earliest and most influential civilizations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Space Station Moon
programme.desc: It was mankind's finest hour, the greatest technological achievement of the 20th century: the Apollo 11 mission to the moon. The program was short lived, some believe it is because we encountered something, or someone, on the moon.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Druid Connection
programme.desc: We explore whether ancient Druids really travelled to North America centuries ago.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Phenomenon
programme.desc: Erich von Däniken's 'Chariots of the Gods?' challenged everything we thought we knew about mankind's history, suggesting that aliens visited Earth in the distant past.

programme.title: Movie: Captain Kidd

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Kristel Maestas & Ronald Bell
programme.desc: When an Airforce veteran falls victim to an unthinkable crime, the search for the truth reveals a twisted tale of revenge and two suspects no one expected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: When a prominent attorney is found savagely stabbed to death in her office, investigators find themselves with a myriad of suspects - from violent felons to lesbian love triangles. In the end, they discover a killer as cold as they come.

programme.title: Snapped: Cynthia Mueller
programme.desc: When medical examiners determine that a terminally ill Arizona man may have not died from natural causes as his family previously thought, a homicide investigation begins to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Up and Vanished: The Vanishing Family
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of Korrina Malinoski, and daughter Annette, from their South Carolina home, has continued to baffle family and police for the past 30 years. Payne and team work to connect the clues and reunite a family in the process.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery in Mustang
programme.desc: Keith Bryan is Mustang, OK's local heroic fireman. Having recently reconciled with his wife, life seems to be on the mend, until a brutal attack in his home leaves his dear wife a widower.

programme.title: Dateline: Broken Bonds
programme.desc: A quiet night was shattered when intruders terrorized a Florida couple and their young son, killing one of them. Investigators questioned the initial story. Then, a tip led them to another family with dark secrets, and that's when bonds were tested.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: When Brett Parker returned to his home in Charlston SC, he discovered the dead bodies of his beloved wife and her friend. At first, it seemed like a robbery gone wrong. However, a closer look at the clues reveals a much darker twisted tale.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Written In Blood
programme.desc: When Karen Pannell was found stabbed to death, a message scrawled in blood seemed like a beacon that could lead detectives to her killer. But what exactly did it mean? It would take a dogged forensic specialist with a keen eye to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: At Close Range
programme.desc: Keith Reed was a highly-regarded school superintendent. When he didn't show up at an out-of-town conference, it set off alarm bells. Investigators took a hard look at his love life for clues and made a startling discovery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deep in the Woods
programme.desc: Kelli Bordeaux was just starting what she hoped to be a long career in the military, but fate had other plans. When she vanished, friends and family launched a frantic search, but it was stranger hell-bent on justice who uncovered the ugly truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Other Side of Paradise
programme.desc: Sandra Galas was born and raised in paradise. So how did something so ugly happen there? Police investigated two men in Sandra's life, but the case went cold. Her father refused to give up, relentlessly pursuing the truth for more than a decade.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Detour
programme.desc: Diane McIver was a successful businesswoman who enjoyed a lavish lifestyle with her husband. Then she was gone. It was a mystery riddled with privilege and power, but investigators needed to answer a crucial question: was this an accident or murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Threat
programme.desc: She was a divorced mother excited about her next chapter in life. Then, five gunshots shattered her plans. Proving who murdered Joan Lockwood was a daunting task for police. An ominous killer was still out there and her family was living in fear.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What They Saw
programme.desc: Detectives believed two young children witnessed the unthinkable, the brutal murder of their mother. The prosecution's case would be built around what they thought those kids observed, but was another version of events possible?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Reckless
programme.desc: This is a story of teens, text messages and a complicated search for the truth. Conrad Roy had vanished. Turns out, he shared a secret with someone close to him. What that confidant did and did not do with the information shattered two families.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Inside the Hunt for El Chapo
programme.desc: For over a decade, El Chapo evaded authorities but one man was determined to catch the infamous kingpin. Former DEA agent Andrew Hogan comes out of the shadows to detail his search and capture with never-before-seen videos and photographs.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: Angel's Landing was a community of free-spirits with Lou Castro at its center. Investigators were suspicious of the mysterious deaths happening there. Now, commune members have courageously decided to tell their stories in hopes of helping others.

programme.title: Movie: War for the Planet of the Apes

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets of Time Travel

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chernobyl's Nuclear Monsters

programme.title: What on Earth?: One Ocean
programme.desc: Six breath-taking images, six unfathomable mysteries; from a gigantic tsunami hundreds of feet high that never hits land, to a secret underground base in China and has an image from space finally revealed the location of the Garden of Eden?

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include the face of Christ is found in a field in Hungary, a photo that claims to show who shot down a passenger jet in Ukraine and a sinister shape in the mountains of Afghanistan that leads investigators to a hidden genocide.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secrets of the Sahara
programme.desc: In 1965, a beautiful 25 mile structure called the Eye of the Sahara was found from space. Its formation is still unknown. Then, a terrifying new weather weapon could be discovered from clouds emanating from an island in the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Vietnam's Lost POWs
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include desperate signs from lost veterans in Vietnam captured by satellite, a fleet of massive ships stranded in the middle of a vast desert and strange walls stretching vast distances across Northern California.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for El Dorado

programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death

programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.desc: Some women can't resist bad boys, but when the fur flies, these women reveal their deadly side.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Two to Terminate
programme.desc: When it came to murder, these women thought two minds were better than one. They were the masterminds, but didn't want to get their hands dirty. For these Deadly Women, it took 'Two to Terminate.'

programme.title: Dateline: Shattered Bonds
programme.desc: Stephen Moore was a speed skater with little direction in life, until he fell for teacher Kathleen Dorsett. When he went missing, it was a puzzle. Then police found his secret audio diary. Clues came pouring out and a bigger mystery was revealed.

programme.title: Dateline: While He Was Sleeping
programme.desc: When a successful luxury car dealer is murdered in his sleep, detectives soon focus in on one of the victim’s many lovers. But with little hard evidence to go on, the investigation stalls – until a year later.

programme.title: Dateline: A Perfect Spot
programme.desc: A romantic Valentine's Day tryst for a Georgia couple takes a deadly turn. Investigators find themselves stumped until evidence of tire treads at the crime scene and a string of cell phone calls reveal a twisted plot of deceit and murder.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia vs. KKK
programme.desc: The amazing story of the hidden war between two of the United States most violent groups, the mafia and the Ku Klux Klan.

programme.title: Hidden History of the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The amazing, untold story of how President Lincoln initiated a series of events that culminated in the moon landing.

programme.title: Hollywood vs. Commies
programme.desc: The amazing story of how Hollywood took on Communism and played a key role in winning the Cold War.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The incredible story of how Nazi scientists and UFOs combined to create technology that changed the world.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Keep Calm and Karrie On
programme.desc: Two sisters take on a dilapidated house in Seguin, Texas, with moldy walls, a leaky roof and a bad odor. While safety and power tools may not be their strongest attributes, the two work to turn the grimy property into a livable space for potential buyers.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: All Play, No Flip
programme.desc: A real estate agent and her energetic husband start their first flip in Jackson, Tennessee. Surprise structural damage, electrical problems and mold turn a one-month project into a ten-month ordeal.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Stilts and Stones May Break the Budget
programme.desc: Husband and wife flipping team, Christine and Greg, decide to flip an enormous house by the beach in southern New Jersey. The flip starts to spiral out of control when Christine's expensive taste interferes with Greg's strict budget.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: A Family That Flips Together
programme.desc: When Brandon found out that his mother and stepfather were going to flip a house, he decided to go to real estate school and invest in their flip. Brandon may be the baby of the family, but he knows a lot. He struggles to get his parents to listen to him.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flipping in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Two friends and stay-at-home moms decide to flip their first house together in New Orleans, Louisiana, but their conflicting design styles and schedule test the limits of their friendship. They'll have to find a way to compromise to finish on time.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Upstate Upset
programme.desc: A husband and wife take on an enormous house in upstate New York for their first flip. Even with a background in construction, they find themselves overstressed and out of luck when the project is delayed by several months.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Momma Knows Best
programme.desc: A college student enlists the help of her mother while flipping a house in Connecticut for money to pay for her tuition. The mother is worried her daughter's social life will distract her from pulling her weight in the project.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Home Is Where the Hearth Is
programme.desc: A couple decides to flip a house they have admired for years in Henderson, TX. But, when their timeline extends beyond their expectations, they are forced to move into the active renovation site in order to keep things moving and cut costs.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Playing Catch Up
programme.desc: All three builds are running behind schedule and must rush to get ahead. John and Heather build a water catchment system but discover they aren't getting enough water pressure, Chris Maynard's windows are delivered by helicopter in strong winds.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Fort in the Woods
programme.desc: John and Heather's build is put on pause as they try to figure out how to install their drywall without covering their timber frame.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Transforming a Shipping Container Into a Portable Barnwood Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys turn a used shipping container into a portable barnwood cabin. They use welding torches and old logs to transform the steel container into a home. Mark searches for the perfect red barnwood to cover it.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a West Virginia Smokehouse Into a Modern Bunkhouse in the Florida Swamp
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a West Virginia smokehouse and a half-barn nearby. They weave the logs together in Florida to create a bunkhouse for their client's kids.

programme.title: Behind the Build: HGTV Dream Home
programme.desc: Go behind the build to see how the HGTV Dream Home 2020 comes together from the ground up. This spectacular home is designed with outdoor living in mind on Hilton Head Island, South Carolina, in one of the island's most sought after communities.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Moving a Pre-Civil War Log Cabin From West Virginia to Tennessee
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a pre-Civil War log cabin in Braxton County, West Virginia. They take it back to Lewisburg to refurbish the logs, then rebuild it for a client who collects historic homes in Elizabethton, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Moving the Last Cabin in Roanoke to a Local Resort
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go way beyond the call of duty to save the last cabin from the old town of Roanoke, West Virginia. The Fox sisters show up and to watch their father's boyhood home get moves to a local four-diamond resort.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Grandma's Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys save the logs from a fire-damaged home in West Virginia. Mark promises the family who sold him the cabin that he will honor their history here. Once the logs are salvaged, the cabin is rebuilt on the Boneyard for a client in Montana.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Thin-Skinned
programme.desc: Mark has a Montana client who wants to give a modern home a classic log cabin look. The guys build a cabin facade using antique log veneers. They also use more log veneers to create a new piece for the Barnwood Showroom. Mark then tours a beautiful home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Old-School Takedown in Harrisville, WV
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders turn to the old-school method of using ropes to take down a log cabin in Harrisville, West Virginia. Later on, they shop at the oldest five-and-dime in America, and meet some modern day pioneers who hewed their own log cabin by hand.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Stubborn as a Mule
programme.desc: The builders save a barn that once housed mules in the iron-mining boomtown of Low Moor, VA. As they work, they find evidence of the barn's industrial past. Later, Mark visits a timber frame that's been converted into a wedding venue.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Ukulele Jam / Grandpa vs. Grandpa
programme.desc: While participating in a Ukulele Jam, Donald loses Mickey's special ukulele. The Happy Helpers are judges for a Hawaiian surfing contest and learn about a lifelong rivalry!

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Challenge / Giganto's Boss
programme.desc: The raptors challenge the Dinos to a game of basketball for the rights to the playground; Rocky convinces everyone he's the Giganto-Whisperer.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Because Triceratops!/ Rock Out

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged!/ Super-charged: Mickey's Monster Rally
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Race for the Rigatoni Ribbon!/ Roaming Around Rome
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang compete against cheating Piston Pietro in Rome. The Happy Helpers cover for a sick friend by giving a tour of Rome to a travel critic.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Sky Pirates / The Disappearing Ninjas
programme.desc: When Night Ninja steals equipment from Pirate Day at school, Catboy jeopardizes the PJ Masks rescue mission. PJ Masks investigate Night Ninja when the ninjalinos keep disappearing!

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Splat Monster
programme.desc: Teeny-Weeny Ninjalino turns into the Splat Monster and traps the PJ Masks on Mystery Mountain. While they are trapped, Night Ninja uses the Splat Monster to take over the night.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: Runaway Bride
programme.desc: Jazzett keeps running from relationships, and now she's running from her own kids. Plus, Shona wants her ex back even after he left her for someone else five years ago.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Russ
programme.desc: Rachel says she's over Ross, but Russ, her new date, is a little too similar to Ross.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Super Cop
programme.desc: Mike becomes hyper vigilant after his wallet is stolen from the squad car while taking a nap.

programme.title: Mom: Sword Fights and a Dominican Shortstop
programme.desc: Christy considers giving up her dream of becoming a lawyer when Bonnie's ex-girlfriend, Jeanine, offers her a lucrative job in real estate. Also, Adam is very curious about Bonnie's past with women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Humiliation Is a Visual Medium
programme.desc: No one believes Charlie when he says that his relationship with Mia is getting serious, and everyone really thinks he's lost it when he confesses that they have been dating for more than a month and haven't consummated the relationship.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pilot
programme.desc: Dre, an advertising exec, is happily anticipating a promotion at work, which would make him the firm's first African American senior vice president. Rainbow, an anesthesiologist, is looking forward to Dre's raise.

programme.title: Black-ish: Blue Valentime
programme.desc: Tensions are high between Dre and Bow as their contractor arrives to remodel the kitchen, realizing they have grown apart. Dre reflects on the good times in his relationship with Bow.

programme.title: Katy Keene: Chapter Four: Here Comes the Sun
programme.desc: Katy finds herself in hot water again at work, and enlists Pepper's help to track down the designer that's key to saving her job. Jorge questions his new relationship and Josie stands up to Alexander and Xandra, which gives her the upper hand.

programme.title: Legacies: I Couldn't Have Done This Without You
programme.desc: The Necromancer sets his plan for revenge in motion. To mend fences with Josie, Hope offers to help her lean more about the mora miserium. Alaric enlists Landon's help to find out if Sebastian is a threat to the school.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's Teeth
programme.desc: A blushing Rachel is busted when she starts a rumour that her boss made a pass at Phoebe.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Bottle Deposit
programme.desc: Newman and Kramer collect bottles and cans and drive them to Michigan for a refund. Elaine gets carried away while bidding on JFK's golf clubs for Mr. Peterman. Jerry takes his car to a fanatical mechanic, who ends up stealing it.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Joyce's Choices
programme.desc: Joyce makes Vince crazy with jealousy when she agrees to have dinner with her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Straw in My Donut Hole
programme.desc: Alan is showered with love and affection upon returning from the hospital, but Zoey isn't so sure it's deserved.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Stevie King
programme.desc: Adam’s love of Stephen King inspires him to try his hand at horror writing. After learning the monster in Adam’s story is based on Beverly, she forces Adam to stay in on Halloween and rewrite it.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Lame Gretzky
programme.desc: Even though he is terrible, Adam tries his best at ice hockey and hopes to impress Murray. Likewise, Murray works hard to show he enjoys watching Adam make home movies. Meanwhile, Beverly drives Erica crazy about her S.A.T.'s.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the '80s Movie
programme.desc: Max and Caroline's plans to attract a more sophisticated clientele to their dessert bar takes a turn when Max befriends a bouncer whose team of arm wrestlers become their latest patrons. Also, Mas and Randy continue to text each other.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Acting Class and Rebound Ass
programme.desc: Keira and Malik share a tender moment at her acting class. Chardonnay's sister comes to town to throw her a divorce party. Plus, Kelly returns to San Diego, where Jason makes another attempt to forge a new relationship.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: This Bud's for You
programme.desc: When Mike's dad moves to town to build the new Outdoor Man store, Vanessa is concerned that some of Bud's well-intentioned ways might raise Mike's high blood pressure.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Raven Symone, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Margaret Cho, and Howie Mandel.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Thomas vs. Bright
programme.desc: A couple who've lost that loving feeling will lose their relationship all together if the defendant is found to be cheating.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Shopping Mayhem/ Elevator Stalemate
programme.desc: An altercation while shopping leads to damaged merchandise; A man misses his performance because of a faulty elevator.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Bar Hoppin'/ Family Matters
programme.desc: A customer claims a bar served him too much alcohol; a sister claims her brother failed to repay a loan.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Gelntser vs. Ramey
programme.desc: A mother of fraternal twins believes her husband fathered one twin and her boyfriend fathered the other.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: My Gift Card Wasn't a Gift/ Service Dog or Disservice Dog
programme.desc: A gift card is mistaken for a tip; a service dog in the workplace triggers allergies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Little People, Big Problems
programme.desc: Jay Rock’s is going to find out if a big mistake will cost him dearly with his girlfriend Annette. His sister, LaToya isn’t fond of Annette and wants to sabotage Jay Rock’s relationship.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman has a child with her ex-boyfriend and claims he cheated on her with his now wife. Her ex is denying paternity of their daughter, claiming she slept with multiple men when they were together. She wants DNA proof of his paternity.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include: Not Paying An Ex Her Share, Not Getting Things Right and Backing Up & Cracking Up.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include: dissing a designer, pooling around and running out.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Ain't Nothing But Bad Dogs/ Unreliable Tech Incident
programme.desc: Dogs damage a car; a dispute over technical difficulties leads to a suit for unpaid wages.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A mother and son are suing for damage to the son's car; the defendant maintains the damage was caused by faulty tires. Then, a man is suing his ex-girlfriend for unpaid rent and a lease buyout fee; the ex says he agreed to pay the rent on himself.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: Heartbroken Teen Moms
programme.desc: Bobby doubts he's the father of his girlfriend Victoria's two-year-old daughter and believes she slept with two different men around the time she got pregnant. To make matters worse, Bobby also believes she's been having sex for money.

programme.title: Maury: We Had a 30 Second One-Night-Stand ... That's Not My Baby
programme.desc: Hope is here to prove J.R. is the father of her two-month-old son. While the two agreed to sleeping with each other, their stories differ after that point.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: You Cheated... Literally
programme.desc: Sarah says her roommate Sara is constantly squabbling with boyfriend Jackson over the dumbest things. Sarah is beyond annoyed with Sara and decides to hook up with Jackson out of sheer malice.

programme.title: Movie: Blindspotting
programme.desc: With only three days left on his probation, Collin is determined to avoid even a small hint of illegal activity, but with his unstable best friend Miles causing trouble the two end up on a collision course that could jeopardize Collin's freedom.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: Hope Floats
programme.desc: A woman returns to her hometown after discovering her husband was having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: Movie: Big
programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty
programme.desc: Bruce, a dissatisfied reporter, finds himself endowed with God's powers. At first he is delighted with all of the things he can do, but he quickly learns how difficult it can be to run the world.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: Jiminy Glick in La La Wood
programme.desc: Small town film critic Jiminy Glick attends the Toronto Film Festival to launch his stardom.

programme.title: Movie: Working Girl
programme.desc: A Wall Street secretary assumes her conniving boss' persona when she gets injured on a skiing holiday.

programme.title: Movie: Nine Months
